variants.description: Amplifier passes the dithered input through at unity gain, so the measured output differential variation is not separated from input variation.
Gain Extraction Flow: shifts the dither decision threshold and stages an under-gain amplifier, so the full flow still runs but misses the gain contract.
Gain Extraction Flow: keeps the flow structure but combines an event-edge perturbation with an under-gain amplifier.
Gain Extraction Flow: keeps the flow structure but combines a reset-polarity perturbation with an under-gain amplifier.
Gain Extraction Flow: preserves the composed stimulus path but makes the amplifier gain too small for the extracted-gain contract.
